name: Virginia Spoon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Gradually stir the cornmeal into the rapidly boiling water. Continue stirring until the mixture is smooth.
3. Add butter, salt, and milk to the mixture. Remove from heat and stir in the egg yolks until combined.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to warm (90-100°F). Meanwhile, beat the egg whites until they hold a stiff peak.
5. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cornmeal mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased or buttered 1-quart baking dish, filling it no more than three-quarters full. Use a rubber spatula to level the surface.
7. Bake in the preheated oven until puffed and nicely browned. The bread is done when a knife inserted into it comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and serve immediately with a spoon.
